hd0850dbcg6926g4395gacfeg8195fce2547a: Hast thou seen the futility of thy actions?
h4400c2fegaac9g4f5dga579g51ac4d127db2: Sorry. I was a bit quick on the draw there.
h07b278b8g5109g458bgbf88ga8c370a0b66b: An apology to one such as myself is but empty air.
h7c42e91fg5c69g431egbd8fg7b8e15f3b463: I know there's some way to find your weakness.
heb16a1a1g2af0g49deg9729g4bc68f38f685: None thou wouldst likely ever possess.
he757f932g45e5g4721g993dg1708e58bfee6: Thou art not the first to say as much.
hd8ceb401g2f1bg4fe6g9db6g8787f019ae2c: Fate spins along as it should.
h64f62e1bg91f5g4762gbc20g22dec406b296: Fate spins along as it should.
ha0b64544g5960g4abag9617g24c70a9bfb1c: I found an empty sarcophagus in the chapel. Is that where you came from?
h47c90b1eg9ef7g4676gb33egbc5421a41e88: That is where I was... housed, yes. And thou needst not know why.
hadc9c183g60ebg40b1gbfe0g1c5c322d5c8b: Then thou must return with the proper payment.
ha5ce2c53g1ae6g4bf8g8515g6d29f55db1f9: This is the price of balance. ([GEN_CheckMagicPocketGold_6057ad05-9492-4630-9f0a-be548b134c54])
hc469b002gf8d0g4a55gb124g50e39736fa28: Well-counted. I recommend keeping thy distance for a moment.
h79cec18egc39cg46b8g9316g697209cfa523: Changed my mind. They can stay dead for now.
h4997ae9cg37ffg4d46gab57g8816a15e3f6d: I want to resurrect all of my fallen companions. ([GEN_CheckMagicPocketGold_2_463b0f43-5410-412d-aba3-875cf81c38ca])
h2112307dg9f66g476cgabbdgad31c024473b: This is the price of balance. ([GEN_CheckMagicPocketGold_2_463b0f43-5410-412d-aba3-875cf81c38ca])
h856beaafgb548g4d48gb4b7gb0d76049a0e3: Although thou dost not seem to be in need of my services.
h193d399eg2593g4b77gaac7gb34872156006: I found an empty sarcophagus in the chapel. Is that where you came from?
hf60d9784g0e31g4349g8e70g1761b2fc75ca: I shall be here in thy camp, for whenever thou hast need of my services.
h92e7a267g6b78g416bgad82gd18e0a10a253: I found an empty sarcophagus in the chapel. Is that where you came from?
h8fa26e27ga0dbg4767g916fga3a747989592: What kind of services can a skeleton offer?
h79eff01cgd24bg48ceg9bd5g9ecbd42baab1: A mending of the threads between life and death.
hff532dfbgf70cg4303g97e7g49b236ff3bb9: Should thou or any of thy compatriots perish, I will cleave soul to body once more.
hc417cbddgc9aag429fgbcd1g2bdbd385aea0: That's incredibly powerful magic. Why is it so easy for you?
h7b862e3fg94f1g4687g9978g8deb47d86c06: Because it is my calling. There is little else to explain.
h3e9cbb87g1ef3g4ac9ga533g4f15b215fe37: Impressive - and probably expensive. What's this cost?
h709cd664g5a5ag434dgbd59ga08f6c8e9aea: Such is life: outrage leading to a singular end.
h394272e9ge15cg4c61gbadege5b551243228: What if I don't have that kind of gold right now? ([GEN_CheckMagicPocketGold_6057ad05-9492-4630-9f0a-be548b134c54])
h12b100d7g9201g41dagb697gdd5a995b77f4: Then I shall wait here patiently until it is acquired.
h4ff8043ege41fg4c2fgba43g2d2beb222622: At least that's straightforward. I want to resurrect someone.
h0062ce6ag424dg46b4g870cg2e22b58a9da9: Very well. Speak their name and it shall be done.
h62bddf3bg5d77g4f99ga010ge13ced818acd: I could use those services right now.
h1a34c102gac52g4c55ga201g4c8e10f04102: Helpful. No one's dead on my side at the moment, though.
hf343481bgd0d5g4f52g936dgb97fa741edee: Care to explain why you're helping me?
h401bfa65gcf6bg4412ga1ddgbb3aa565caa6: Be assured it is not by choice.
hda559f74g446ag445eg99edg1750208f9a8c: Not to be rude, but what are you?
hd4e6daabgb3d5g475agaf7dg798f68d69315: There are many answers to that question. None are important.
hb83c6301g0f6eg4d46gbd8cgec5d23e70423: Skeletons aren't supposed to be able to talk.
h2b375adege5ecg47d4ga5cbg0c9a515a7260: Are you going to explain further?
hd1860b99ga250g4f0cg934fg281dfda2a3db: If you won't answer, then get out of my camp.
h87d57be5ge2f3g45e8gb700g129fedc0957b: Focus on the divine energy you feel from his presence.
h904e6b18g6e50g4a3cgb312gcbea321ebd61: Focus on the divine energy you feel from his presence.
h8beb176fgea31g4969g88cbge4dda1c3dab7: *He has a divine aspect, yes, a reflection of death itself. Eternal and inescapable.*
h218d213cg385fg4d53g86b2gb74de16b921f: All that power - are you a god's chosen?
hcb463d1fgce22g4833gbaefg91215469492e: I shall answer no further questions in that regard.
h92114857g01cag4005gb134g7b9fdc4f2d5e: Are you a herald of Myrkul? Death's shroud surrounds you.
he7b9ce98g3345g4b7fg8897g682dd5bb2e50: Are you a herald of my deity?
h788890fdgfb2ag4af7g8db6g7f1170cf4b76: I am not. Myrkul and I walk very different paths.
hea49b2fcg89dcg4773ga850g6d509f0f21e7: You walk with death. Are you a chosen of Kelemvor?
hc2d37bf5g74eeg48d4g8d17g5e6b2603fe57: Are you a chosen of Kelemvor?
h030fca04g8ddcg44a0gb8e7gd27b9e0c06b6: No, although Kelemvor chose well to bless one such as yourself.
h3f5f85cdg2976g499dg8435g01366cde3796: *There is great divine energy indeed, but the source is unclear.*
h4ee20103g9c85g4b71gb519g9d7a7984c1fc: Very well. Let us see how long thy understanding takes.
h7aa8430agd4a7g4425g9a50g4213c022d557: Ah, another. Thy name has been recorded.
